title: I'm OK being left behind, thanks
author: coinfused
aiHeadline: I'm totally fine with being the last person to figure out how to use TikTok, thanks a lot, internet.

title: ArXiv declares independence from Cornell
author: bookstore-romeo
aiHeadline: ArXiv breaks up with Cornell: 'It's not you, it's me, and I need to be my own preprint server now.'

title: Chuck Norris has died
author: mp3il
aiHeadline: Chuck Norris 'dies' but we all know he's just taking a break from being indestructible.

title: France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app
author: MrDresden
aiHeadline: France's aircraft carrier gets tracked by a fitness app: 'I didn't know my morning jog would lead to this.'

title: OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent
author: rbanffy
aiHeadline: OpenCode: Because who needs sleep when you can have an AI write your code for you? Open source, so you can argue about it on GitHub all night.
